title: Session 52: Proving the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview Using the interpretation of the definite integral as describing the area under a graph, we prove the second fundamental theorem. Then we use FTC2 to prove FTC1.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Proof of the Second Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
